reason: Successfully navigated to the agent, sent a GitHub username request, granted GitHub account access when prompted, and verified the agent returned a response with the GitHub username.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Page loaded successfully showing the Super Agent interface with agent list in sidebar
Found and clicked the "QA-20260407-170017-lnxz" agent in the sidebar - Agent detail page opened showing agent status as "idle"
Verified agent status is "idle" - Agent status displayed in both sidebar and header as "idle"
Sent message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." - Message successfully submitted and agent began processing
GitHub account access card appeared, GitHub was already selected - Account access request card displayed with GitHub account checked
Clicked "Allow Access" button - Permission granted and agent continued processing
GitHub API request review card appeared asking for GET /user permission - Selected "Allow Once" to allow the API request
Waited for agent response - Agent worked for 48 seconds and completed processing
Verified response contains GitHub username - Response clearly states: "Your GitHub username is yiw190."
Took screenshot documenting the result - Full page screenshot captured showing the complete conversation with the GitHub username displayed
